title: agent.message v1
description: Agent-to-agent message routed through nervous-bus. Used by the /peer skill (Claude Code → Claude Code) AND by hearth-loom loomies for cross-container coordination. Receivers MAY publish agent.message.ack with the same id once the message is consumed.

to.description: Recipient address. Either session_id (1:1) or project (broadcast to any agent active in that project) or agent kind. At least one of session_id/project/agent must be set.

kind.description: Discriminator for receiver-side handling. text=plain message; share_artifact=file/cycle/PR ref; request_help=open question with optional context; share_research=deer-flow cycle id + summary; ack=receipt confirmation

body.description: Free-form text body. For non-text kinds, body is the human-readable summary (the structured payload goes in 'attachment')

attachment.description: Optional structured payload — interpretation depends on kind

ref.description: URI/ID/path to the artifact (e.g. cycle_id, PR url, file path, bead_id)

reply_to.description: id of the agent.message this is replying to (threading)

expires_at.description: Optional TTL — receivers SHOULD ignore messages past this time
